warnings: This audit explains existing score, category, rerank, and Top-20 decisions only; it does not establish relevance, Precision, Recall, F1, or an official score.
A high score, category, source count, or Top-20 position is not a human relevance judgement.
Boundary probes validate implementation semantics only and must not be used to tune thresholds, weights, or ranking rules.

missing_values.title: Paper schema requires a string; casefold is exact
